base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_1_eagle_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 1 'Eagle' — introductory dungeon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 1 'Eagle' — introductory dungeon; Aquamentus boss, Bow-item. Rooms labeled by letters spelling EAGLE silhouette on map
